attribution: GenCAD-Code (CADCODER), real_photo_test_set: 400 real photographs of 50 physically 3D-printed DeepCAD test-split objects. The repo commits NO LICENSE and is explicitly derived from DeepCAD (MIT (c)2022 Rundi Wu); the derived corpus does not restate a licence, so nothing is vendored -- MANIFEST-ONLY (paths + SHA-256, resolved from resources/ at runtime, degrade-to-empty). The metadata rows, the closed axis vocabularies and the Object_ID->DeepCAD_ID map are recorded as facts with citation. Ground-truth CAD resolves THROUGH the DeepCAD corpus via id_map. Photo<->row pairing follows the committed scripts/upload_realphoto_to_hf.py (sorted png filename order).
